commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=2260c7fbb825766e363624587518ad6b9ed635f5)
commands.review_summary:
The PR centralizes inbound quote/forward/thread supplemental context projection in core helpers, exports new channel-inbound SDK finalization helpers, migrates several bundled channel plugins, and updates focused tests plus changelog.

PR surface: Source +395, Tests +231, Docs +1. Total +627 across 32 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. PR head gates Signal supplemental.quote on replyToBody while current main forwards ReplyToSender independently, and the SDK baseline drift is visible from added exports without matching contract artifact changes.
commands.review_followup: This protected maintainer-labeled, cross-channel public SDK PR needs human review and real behavior proof; automation cannot supply the contributor's live channel proof.

target.title: refactor: centralize inbound supplemental context
target.body:
## Summary

Moves more inbound context responsibility into core. Channel plugins now pass canonical supplemental/facts payloads; core owns visibility filtering, media payload projection, lazy quote-media merge, self-reply suppression, and legacy prompt-field projection.

What changed:

- `finalizeInboundContext` accepts `MsgContext.SupplementalContext` and projects it into existing `ReplyTo*`, `Forwarded*`, `Thread*`, `GroupSystemPrompt`, and untrusted-context fields before prompt normalization.
- `finalizeChannelInboundContext` now centralizes supplemental filtering, media payload merge, optional async quote-media resolution, self-quote body/media suppression, injected finalizer support, and hidden quote/forward/thread diagnostics.
- `buildChannelInboundEventContext` now routes through that core finalizer instead of expanding supplemental/media fields itself.
- Discord and Telegram now await `buildChannelInboundEventContext({ resolveSupplementalMedia: true })`; channel code still owns native fetch/parsing, core owns merge/suppression/finalization.
- MS Teams, Signal, QQBot, and other touched direct-finalizer paths moved further toward `buildChannelInboundEventContext`/core finalization.
- `resolveChannelInboundSupplementalContext` is now a deprecated SDK wrapper around the finalizer path, kept for compatibility.
- Added explicit async SDK param types so `resolveSupplementalMedia: true` is type-sound and always returns a `Promise`.
- Relaxed defaultable/unused inbound fact requirements so plugins no longer restate `provider`, `surface`, same-origin `originatingTo`, unused `routePeer`, unused `envelopeFrom`, or unused command diagnostics.
- Preserved existing legacy flat fields; supplemental projection fills missing values only.
- Added an `Unreleased` changelog entry for the plugin SDK helper/export/deprecation surface.

API/deprecation notes:

- Deprecated: `filterChannelTurnSupplementalContext` alias.
- Deprecated: `resolveChannelInboundSupplementalContext`; prefer `finalizeChannelInboundContext({ resolveSupplementalMedia: true })` or `buildChannelInboundEventContext({ resolveSupplementalMedia: true })`.
- Preferred: `filterChannelInboundSupplementalContext` for full supplemental filtering.
- Preferred: `filterChannelInboundQuoteContext` for quote-only checks.
- Preferred canonical payload: `SupplementalContextFacts` on `MsgContext.SupplementalContext`.
- Not deprecated: legacy `ReplyTo*`, `Forwarded*`, and `Thread*` fields. They remain runtime/template compatibility fields and are now projected by core.

Diff/LOC notes:

- Current PR diff vs merge-base `origin/main`: +1307 / -680, net +627.
- Current two-dot diff vs `origin/main`: +1308 / -768, net +540.
- Production/runtime-ish triple-dot diff, excluding tests/docs/changelog: +918 / -523, net +395.
- This is not a LOC win. The win is responsibility movement and less per-channel ownership of prompt projection; the cost is new core async overload/compat surface and tests.

## Verification

Latest proof after the final async finalizer pass:

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/channels/inbound-event/context.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.context.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-context.dm-topic-threadid.test.ts extensions/msteams/src/monitor-handler/message-handler.authz.test.ts extensions/signal/src/monitor/event-handler.inbound-context.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/channel-inbound.test.ts`
  - passed: 5 files, 57 tests
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-context.dm-topic-threadid.test.ts src/channels/inbound-event/context.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/channel-inbound.test.ts`
  - passed: 3 files, 22 tests
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test-finalizer-refactor-7.tsbuildinfo`
  - passed
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test-finalizer-refactor-6.tsbuildinfo`
  - passed
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/channels/inbound-event/context.ts src/channels/inbound-event/context.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/channel-inbound.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.context.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-context.session.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-context.dm-topic-threadid.test.ts extensions/msteams/src/monitor-handler/message-handler.ts extensions/signal/src/monitor/event-handler.ts`
  - passed
- `git diff --check`
  - passed
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --no-web-search --output /tmp/inbound-refactor-autoreview-merge-finalizer-5.txt --json-output /tmp/inbound-refactor-autoreview-merge-finalizer-5.json`
  - clean: no accepted/actionable findings; overall patch is correct

Earlier focused channel proof during this refactor:

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/channels/inbound-event/context.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/inbound-context.test.ts`
  - passed: 2 files, 28 tests
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/msteams/src/monitor-handler/message-handler.authz.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/handler.body-for-agent.test.ts`
  - passed: 2 files, 25 tests
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/whatsapp/src/auto-reply/monitor/inbound-context.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/auto-reply/monitor/inbound-dispatch.test.ts`
  - passed: 2 files, 48 tests
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/signal/src/monitor/event-handler.inbound-context.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor.gating.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/inbound-processing.systemPrompt.test.ts`
  - passed: 3 files, 48 tests
- `timeout 240s node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-context.dm-topic-threadid.test.ts -t "builds Telegram payloads through the shared channel turn context"`
  - passed: 1 test
- `timeout 180s node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/telegram/src/bot.test.ts --testNamePattern "includes replied image media|keeps reply linkage while omitting filtered binary reply captions|redacts forwarded origin inside reply targets"`
  - passed: 3 tests
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-discord.config.ts --testNamePattern "does not inject the bot's previous message body|does not attach referenced reply media when reply context is hidden|processDiscordMessage"`
  - passed: 2 files, 77 tests
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/feishu/src/bot.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/outbound-dispatch.test.ts --testNamePattern "quoted|quote|thread"`
  - passed: Feishu file, QQBot skipped by pattern, 14 tests
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/outbound-dispatch.test.ts`
  - passed: 1 file, 3 tests

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Inbound quote/forward/thread supplemental context is filtered, media-merged, and projected consistently in core while preserving channel-specific parsing, fetches, routing metadata, and Discord/Telegram self-reply suppression behavior.

Real environment tested: Local source checkout with focused core, plugin SDK, QQBot, and representative rich-channel Vitest suites plus core/extension test typecheck.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: See `Verification` above; latest commands were run after the final async finalizer and type-contract fixes.

Evidence after fix: Focused tests passed for core finalization, SDK exports, Discord, Telegram, WhatsApp, Signal, iMessage, Matrix, MS Teams, Feishu, and QQBot surfaces; local autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings after fixing the async overload contract and stale import findings.

Observed result after fix: Channels pass canonical `SupplementalContext`/facts or builder facts into core; `finalizeInboundContext` projects legacy fields once; Discord/Telegram lazy reply media is resolved by the finalizer path only when visible and not self-suppressed.

What was not tested: Full repository test suite, full CI completion, and live channel roundtrips were not run for this refactor PR.
